arts.ttl: Preview: Newport County vs. Carlisle United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's League Two clash between Newport County and Carlisle United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Former Carlisle United star Murphy named manager of the month
arts.sum: Former Carlisle United favourite Peter Murphy has been named Scottish League One manager of the month with Queen of the South.
